channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.ign.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.ign.com

item.title: Nintendo's Next Animated Movie Gets April 2028 Release Date
item.content:encoded:
The Super Mario Galaxy Movie might still be in theaters, but we already know when Nintendo's next animated film will arrive.

Universal has now updated its movie schedule with an "Untitled Illumination/Nintendo event film" that's set to launch on April 12, 2028. Illumination, of course, is the animation studio behind the Minions franchise, as well as The Super Mario Bros. Movie and its just-launched sequel.

A 2028 return for Nintendo's animated movie franchise comes as no shock. Rumors have persisted for some time that the company is mounting a Donkey Kong spinoff film, something that the character's absence in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie made even more obvious.

Nintendo also already has a 2027 movie on the books — its highly-anticipated live-action The Legend of Zelda film, which just finished shooting in New Zealand. Meanwhile, Bowser film actor Jack Black has suggested he'll be back for a third Mario animated movie in 2029.

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie – 65-Tonne Sand Sculpture

All of this places Universal's April 2028 date as very likely being for that Donkey Kong movie, with Seth Rogen anticipated to return in his previous Super Mario Bros. Movie role. Fans are hoping this spinoff explores more of DK's jungle kingdom, and viewers get to properly meet other Kong characters (Diddy and Dixie appeared previously, though only in brief cameos).

Time will tell if Nintendo's Donkey Kong film tells an all-new story, or whether elements from various DK video games will be incorporated. Could we see more of his Donkey Kong Country adventures? Or perhaps he'll be teaming up with a young Pauline? We did see Mayor Pauline in the Super Mario Bros. Movie, but perhaps this story could be a prequel — or, we may get an origin story for a new, younger Pauline, which Donkey Kong Bananza hinted at. Hey, if the Super Mario Galaxy Movie can finally confirm the canon story behind Rosalina's origins, anything is possible.

Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky @tomphillipseg.bsky.social

Recommends

In This Article

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Project Silent Whispers Takes Cinematic Adventure To The Next Level
item.content:encoded:
Project Silent Whispers is giving romantic adventures a major upgrade. It’s a player-led romantic adventure in an urban city, integrating high-stakes survival narratives. It’s upgrading everything you think you know about the genre with a whole new level of immersion, bringing you into a spectacular world full of exceptional technical detail and the dreamiest guys. Amazing sci-fi elements like time loops give a welcome twist to the game, and there’s an inescapable sense of danger, bringing your survival skills into play. This is no visual novel, bursting to life with 3D characters and worlds. Project Silent Whispers is a cinematic romance powered by the Unreal Engine 5, delivering an urban adventure and high-stakes narrative.

Traditionally, otome games are a story-driven romance video game that is distinctly female-oriented. They feature a female protagonist who balances any number of male suitors. They feature multiple dialogue options offering plenty of variety in how you interact with the fantasy worlds, as you journey on your quest to create an unforgettable romance.

While Project Silent Whispers has the foundations of an otome game, it’s a whole new world. This is far from your conventional dating sim: it’s your personalized high-stakes adventurous romance story. This is a UE5 cinematic love adventure game. The vast World Concept Framework was written by Hampton Fancher (who wrote Blade Runner and Blade Runner 2049) and David Gordon, giving you a sense of the spectacular level of depth and possibilities you can expect. The project’s overall worldbuilding direction and narrative design were developed by none other than Archosaur Games. That means you can anticipate top of the line worldbuilding and true cinematic scope with high-stakes survival narratives and a dynamite romance adventure.

Developer Archosaur Games has a sterling reputation in the mobile game sphere, excelling in a wide-variety of genres. Its MMORPG Dragon Raja, first launched in 2019, has amassed over 35 million registered players. Life Makeover, the studio's 2023 game, allows players to create their own character, dream home, and extravagant outfits with practically unlimited customization options. Archosaur has long-standing experience in the Unreal Engine. Paired with their extensive R&D experience and deep technical reserves they’ve built over the years, Archosaur has true mastery of the engine, so you can count on a high-quality game with plenty of stability.

Because Archosaur is using the Unreal Engine 5, you can expect console quality graphics. The level of detail is jaw-dropping, and new systems allow for subtle changes that make a huge difference. The dynamic perspiration simulation system means sweat forms naturally across the skin, delivering a sense of tension to every breath, and wonder to every push-up. And realistic skin indentation and pressure mark dynamics gives a new layer of intensity to facial expressions that leave a lingering, tantalizing impression. Put simply: Project Silent Whispers provides a whole universe of romantic immersion.

Project Silent Whispers offers first-person immersive interaction. You’ll have the agency to make the decisions you want. There’s no waiting around for love. In the game, you can freely explore the City of Fading Light, a space connected to infinite worlds. While you go about daily life and build relationships and experience romantic adventures, you must also enter high-risk, dangerous spaces to progress the story through emotional choices, trust, and survival. In this high-concept world, you explore infinite worlds, loop resets, trying to uncover the truth behind the city while forging a great love. The high-stakes urban setting gives your romantic relationships a new level of adventure and emotional weight.

Take control of your interactions, and experience significant emotional progression with all the freedom and opportunity a big city offers you. And Project Silent Whispers city isn’t the mere backdrop you may be accustomed to in visual novels, but a place rife for exploration. You can wander this urban fantasy at your leisure, taking in the sights and sounds, and witness high-octane vehicles roam the city streets. You’ll never know what's waiting around the corner.

When it comes to dating, Project Silent Whispers lets the player take control. You have the power of choice, and the dates are led by you. There are a multitude of potential dates. You could have a date at the beach and see your beau’s rippling muscles glisten in the water and feel the warmth of the sun on your skin. Perhaps an elegant dinner at a candlelit restaurant, followed by an explosive fireworks display. Fancy taking to the skies on a clear day on an ultra-romantic hot air balloon ride? Or how about renting out an amusement park and getting a wintery carousel ride just for you and that special someone? In Project Silent Whispers, it’s all possible.

Who is it that you’ll be dating in this immersive love adventure? In Project Silent Whispers, three distinct guys will be vying for your desire:

  • Alarik – Alarik is a physically imposing, intense guy with fire powers, boasting a pair of giant wings, rippling muscles, and a distinctive Adam’s apple.
  • Theron – Theron is physically magnetising. There’s a dangerous attraction and tight tension with his deep-bronze skin and broad shoulders. He’s a towering height of 192cm and delivers a feral bodyguard fantasy, transforming into a werewolf.
  • Valen – Valen is a sensitive, gentle guy with colourful pink hair and ice abilities. The kind of guy you’d have an everlasting crush on. Beyond his sweet reproach lies a man with plenty of mystery waiting to be uncovered.

The appeal of these three men goes far beyond their good looks. They offer distinct and clearly defined relationship types, different fantasy routes, and offer something for every type of player.

Project Silent Whispers exists in hopes of bringing female players into a deeper and more immersive romantic experience. The otome world deserves more advanced visuals, more complex narrative structures, and higher-quality, breathtaking experiences. With Project Silent Whispers, Archosaur Games is ready to deliver.



https://www.ign.com/articles/project-silent-whispers-takes-cinematic-adventure-to-the-next-level
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
